Sarah Blanchard: Sabrina Lavilla = All Good = GO
Will brought a level of detail and rigour that I rarely see on this. Sarah Blanchard do you have that analysis? In any case should be updated.

Keep in mind the way the software P&L has been done historically is misleading as it does not recognize the value to the org of being able to get rid of CloudSphere, Abiquo, etc etc. The advantage of no longer supporting direct customers is it becomes part of the "stack" for delivering hybrid cloud. Leading to the circular problem of "what tools can we replace CloudMC with" (having already replaced some of these tools and claimed the savings elsewhere).
where is the spreadsheet will put together? or google sheet
Updates considerations based on board's push to SHUT DOWN (Francisco) or KTLO (JP) the software, highlighting the risks of losing the direct software customers:

Yes Adam Nelson this comes back to the "enablement" problem. I will sit here and things will pass in front of my eyes and I won't ask questions, and then after I will say "I can't do my job because I haven't been sufficiently trained" or "I don't remember that". So how can we do a better job of getting people not just ON the same page but actually understanding it. The only thing I have come across so far is insisting that people either have to present it back to us (potentially improving it in the process) OR maybe some standardized testing
Everything here has been shared with board and company at a high level, not gory details.
However, before I dig in... I'll make my comment... just because it was presented, doesn't mean it was presented well
Oh I know Adam Nelson  Updated commercial strategy for FY26 which we are in process of updating: Aptum Commercial FY26.pptx
I don't have any excuses I guess

body.content: Product Strategy in OneDrive

I have a lot more I will try not to overwhelm but just show where we are coming from as we make another push, without Marc P in the VP Product role, to make sure we don't forget everything we have done and why so we can learn from it instead of just repeat history.
summer of 2023, a year before we started calling this APT cloud, the strategy was called "single pane of glass"

Bio for review: Adam Nelson Website Bio - Copy - Copy.docx

 

Hey Adam,

 

I've drafted your bio for the aptum.com leadership page based on your LinkedIn profile, keeping it consistent with the existing bios on the site. Could you please take a look and let me know if anything needs adjusting?

 

There's a placeholder in the second paragraph for your current day-to-day scope as VP Operations, since I didn't want to guess on that. If you could fill that in, that would be great.

 

Once you're happy with the English version, we'll also need a French translation and a professional headshot.

 

I'm aiming to get this live by tomorrow, so if you could get back to me tomorrow noon that would be ideal.

 

Thanks!
